footer.tagline: Small-batch clothing and wigs, made with care.

about.title: About NStore
about.intro: NStore started as a small, close-to-home project: everyday clothing and hand-tied wigs, chosen the way you'd choose a swatch — by feel, by shade, by how it makes you stand.
about.body1: We work in small batches rather than mass production, which means what you see in the shop is genuinely what's in stock, not a catalogue of things that might arrive eventually. New pieces go up as they're ready, from track suits built for cold-weather days to wigs sourced and hand-checked before they ever reach the shop.
about.body2: Every order is confirmed directly with you — sizing, delivery, and payment — because we'd rather get those details right than automate them away.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Questions about sizing, stock, or an order? Reach out directly — we reply personally to every message.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what information NStore collects when you use this site and how it's used.
privacy.section1Title: What we store in your browser
privacy.section1Body: This site keeps your cart contents and language preference in your browser's local storage. This data stays on your device — it isn't sent to any server or database, and we don't have access to it.
privacy.section2Body: NStore doesn't process payments online. When you check out, your order details are sent to us via WhatsApp or email, which you send directly using your own WhatsApp or email account, subject to their respective privacy policies.
privacy.section3Body: This site loads fonts from Google Fonts and is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Both may process basic technical information (like your IP address) as part of delivering content, under their own privacy policies.
privacy.section4Body: If you have questions about this policy or how your information is handled, contact us using the details on our Contact page.
